query: SELECT hostName, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions FROM host_listings WHERE hostName = 'Ayi' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT hostName, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions FROM host_listings WHERE hostName = 'Ayi' LIMIT 1;

rows.overseasExperience: I lived in Singapore for 3 years and traveled extensively across Southeast Asia. I also spent time in Japan learning traditional cooking techniques.
rows.funFacts: I can name every ingredient just by smell! I also collect vintage Chinese teapots and have over 50 in my collection. My neighbors call me the "Dumpling Queen" because I make them every Sunday.
rows.whyHost: After years of traveling and experiencing hospitality around the world, I wanted to share the warmth of Chinese home cooking with visitors. Food has always been my love language, and I believe the best way to understand a culture is through sharing a meal at someone's table. Every guest who leaves my home becomes part of my extended family.
rows.culturalPassions: Beyond food, I'm passionate about traditional Chinese tea ceremonies and calligraphy. I love sharing stories about Shanghai's old neighborhoods and taking guests to hidden local markets that tourists never find. I also practice Tai Chi every morning in the park!

stdout:
hostName	overseasExperience	funFacts	whyHost	culturalPassions
Ayi 	I lived in Singapore for 3 years and traveled extensively across Southeast Asia. I also spent time in Japan learning traditional cooking techniques.	I can name every ingredient just by smell! I also collect vintage Chinese teapots and have over 50 in my collection. My neighbors call me the "Dumpling Queen" because I make them every Sunday.	After years of traveling and experiencing hospitality around the world, I wanted to share the warmth of Chinese home cooking with visitors. Food has always been my love language, and I believe the best way to understand a culture is through sharing a meal at someone's table. Every guest who leaves my home becomes part of my extended family.	Beyond food, I'm passionate about traditional Chinese tea ceremonies and calligraphy. I love sharing stories about Shanghai's old neighborhoods and taking guests to hidden local markets that tourists never find. I also practice Tai Chi every morning in the park!
